# Masemi

*A world generated by Cartogenesis v0.12.0 from seed `vahalia`. Regenerate it exactly with `node src/cli.ts generate --seed vahalia`.*

## Overview

- **Extent:** 360 × 360 cells
- **Land / ocean:** 57.4% land, 42.5% ocean, 7 lake(s)
- **Climate & life:** dominant biome **Savanna**, 16 biomes in all
- **Peoples:** 33 regions, 23 settlements, 3 realms
- **Capital:** Monadianale, seat of House Osiriano
- **Dominant power:** Sike (of 6 surviving realm(s))
- **The present year:** 1174 After Reckoning
- **Highest peak:** 4,500 m · **volcanoes:** 9 (1 active)

## Volcanoes

- **Mount Fjallby** — cinder cone, extinct, summit 4,500 m
- **Mount Groknu** — stratovolcano, dormant, summit 4,500 m
- **Mount Bundkna** — stratovolcano, dormant, summit 4,500 m
- **Mount Steisto** — stratovolcano, extinct, summit 4,500 m
- **Mount Fjybauheim** — stratovolcano, dormant, summit 4,387 m
- **Mount Knobra** — stratovolcano, extinct, summit 4,326 m
- **Mount Dova** — stratovolcano, extinct, summit 4,129 m
- **Mount Thauskau** — shield, extinct, summit 4,094 m
- **Mount Varnhra** — shield, active, summit 3,452 m

## Notable features

- **Mount Stobrabrau** — the highest peak
- **The Biriameoiaa** — the greatest river
- **Lake Miti** — the largest inland water

- Tadaa is an inland reach of sun-scoured dunes, its people caravan-traders and readers of stars.
- Askauheim is an inland reach of snowbound heights, its folk hardy and sea-wise, seat of Greillsteia.
- Panamaupi is a coast of rolling grassland, a country of vineyards and old stone towns, seat of Timaci.
- Maamki is a coast of golden savanna, its people caravan-traders and readers of stars.
- Bohragard is a coast of frozen barrens, its folk hardy and sea-wise, seat of Greiy.
- Khemazaa is an inland reach of dry basin country, its people caravan-traders and readers of stars.
- Iteesh is a coast of golden savanna, its people caravan-traders and readers of stars, seat of Ghame.
- Jekhaabad is an inland reach of golden savanna, its people caravan-traders and readers of stars.
- Ghashaa is a coast of golden savanna, its people caravan-traders and readers of stars, seat of Rukha.
- Voskaheim is an inland reach of cold, stony flats, its folk hardy and sea-wise.
- Thafjo is an inland reach of bare grey peaks, its folk hardy and sea-wise.
- Retentese is an inland reach of bare grey peaks, a country of vineyards and old stone towns.
- Jetaimai is a coast of golden savanna, its people caravan-traders and readers of stars.

## Notable figures

- **Bonaavento, the Architect** — Bonaavento raised the great road between Monadianale and Peonimortia.
- **Naciapiaa, the Heretic** — Naciapiaa was exiled from Monadianale for denying the old gods.
- **Seossosenasiavento, the Scholar** — Seossosenasiavento mapped the waters of Miti.
- **Nitaulenpia, the Explorer** — Nitaulenpia charted the far coasts and traced the Biriameoiaa to its source.
- **Badata, the General** — Badata broke the long siege of Khighaa.

## Faiths

### the Cult of Qanqa — Qanqa, god of the Sun

> Each dawn Qanqa drives the sun over Stobrabrau; the people of Tadaa greet it with fire.

Followed across 18 region(s).

### the Rite of Fjaagard — Fjaagard, god of the Hearth

> Fjaagard lit the first hearth in Askauheim, and its flame has never since gone out.

Followed across 7 region(s).

### the Faith of Raramorra — Raramorra, god of the Storm

> Raramorra rides the storms down the Biriameoiaa, and Panamaupi both fears and blesses the rain.

Followed across 3 region(s).

### the Rite of Eliiaaeeiel — Eliiaaeeiel, god of the Harvest

> Eliiaaeeiel scattered the first seed across Thaewynaeassye; the golden fields were the gift, and the tithe the price.

Followed across 5 region(s).

## Resources & trade

- **Major exports:** Livestock, Horses, Grain, Fish, Wine
- **Wealthiest settlement:** Monadianale
- **Trade hubs:** Monadianale, Arghamshi, Ninteeotauvento
- **Deposits:** Iron ×35, Copper ×25, Gold ×11, Gems ×7, Stone ×67, Coal ×29, Timber ×8, Grain ×33, Livestock ×143, Fish ×14, Furs ×16, Spices ×1, Salt ×22, Horses ×42, Wine ×15

## Legends of the founding age

- **31 After Reckoning** — The city of Monadianale was founded on a sheltered harbour, destined to become the seat of power.
- **54 After Reckoning** — The city of Peonimortia was founded on a sheltered harbour.
- **60 After Reckoning** — Monadianale rose to rule its hinterland, and the realm of Masemi was proclaimed.
- **61 After Reckoning** — The city of Khighaa was founded on a sheltered harbour.
- **85 After Reckoning** — Peonimortia rose to rule its hinterland, and the realm of Vobica was proclaimed.
- **87 After Reckoning** — Khighaa rose to rule its hinterland, and the realm of Raikhza was proclaimed.
- **545 After Reckoning** — Stobrabrau woke in fire and ash; a hard winter followed, and harvests failed across the land.
- **585 After Reckoning** — An academy founded on the shores of Miti gathered the age's finest cartographers.
- **940 After Reckoning** — A great storm-tide flooded Monadianale; the lower quarters were lost to the sea.
- **1112 After Reckoning** — Under a long peace, Monadianale flourished; its libraries and roads became the wonder of the world.

## Heightmap

A real 360×360 16-bit heightmap is exported alongside this report (`.heightmap16.png` and raw `.heightmap.r16`). Import it into Blender, Unity, Godot, or World Machine and scale the height to **4,500 m** (value 65535 = 4,500 m above the lowest point). The topographic contour map (`.topo.png`) shows the same relief as isolines.
